name: Main Layout
summary: Root layout component with resizable sidebar and agent panel. Uses a ResizableDivider for adjustable panel widths. Conditionally renders pages based on navigation state.
goals: Provide a responsive layout with sidebar, content area, and agent panel
Support resizable panel widths via drag divider
Conditionally render page content based on current route
Handle panel collapse and maximize states

acceptanceCriteria.then: the sidebar or agent panel width adjusts accordingly
the agent panel expands to fill the available space

unit-test.then: the divider tracks mouse movement and updates width

end-to-end.when: user opens and resizes the agent panel
end-to-end.then: the layout responds correctly with smooth resizing

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
